name: EU Assessment List for Trustworthy AI (ALTAI)

dimensions.name: transparency_explainability
dimensions.description: Ensure traceability and explainability for relevant decisions.
assessment_questions: Is model behavior traceable through documentation and decision logs?
Are explanations available to affected users and operators at decision time?

dimensions.name: fairness_nondiscrimination
dimensions.description: Assess fairness and discrimination risk across impacted groups.
assessment_questions: Are impacted groups and vulnerable populations explicitly identified?
Are bias testing and mitigation controls documented across the lifecycle?
Is there a remediation path for discriminatory outcomes?

dimensions.name: safety_robustness
dimensions.description: Address reliability, resilience, and misuse prevention.
assessment_questions: Are robustness tests performed across realistic stress and edge conditions?
Is there monitoring for model drift and performance degradation in production?
Are fallback or safe-fail mechanisms defined for unsafe operating states?
Are cybersecurity and adversarial resilience controls in place?
Is misuse/abuse prevention evaluated before deployment?

dimensions.name: privacy_data_governance
dimensions.description: Enforce privacy controls and lawful data lifecycle management.
assessment_questions: Is personal data collection limited to a clear lawful purpose?
Are retention, deletion, and access controls enforced and auditable?
Is sensitive data handled with appropriate minimization and protection?
Are data lineage and provenance documented across processing steps?
Are third-party data transfers governed by explicit contractual controls?

dimensions.name: human_agency_oversight
dimensions.description: Preserve meaningful human control and intervention capability.
assessment_questions: Can authorized humans override or halt automated decisions?
Are operator roles and decision authority clearly defined?
Are escalation pathways available for contested outcomes?
Is user recourse available when decisions have significant impact?

dimensions.name: accountability
dimensions.description: Define responsibility, governance, and remediation ownership.
assessment_questions: Are accountable owners assigned for deployment, monitoring, and incident response?
Is there a governance process for escalation and corrective action?
Are audit and reporting responsibilities documented end-to-end?

dimensions.name: transparency_explainability
assessment_questions: Are model assumptions and limitations documented for stakeholders?
Are decision traces available for post-hoc review and audit?

dimensions.name: fairness_nondiscrimination
dimensions.description: Identify and mitigate inequitable model outcomes.
assessment_questions: Are fairness risks identified with measurable indicators?
Are mitigation controls validated after model updates?

dimensions.name: safety_robustness
dimensions.description: Manage robustness, resilience, and safety risk.
assessment_questions: Are reliability thresholds defined and monitored in operations?
Are stress, failure mode, and robustness evaluations routinely executed?
Are safety incidents captured and used to update controls?
Are resilience controls validated against foreseeable disruptions?
Are deployment gates tied to safety and reliability evidence?

dimensions.name: privacy_data_governance
dimensions.description: Manage privacy and data governance risks.
assessment_questions: Are privacy risks assessed for data collection and processing activities?
Are governance controls in place for data access and retention?

dimensions.name: human_agency_oversight
dimensions.description: Include meaningful human review and oversight practices.
assessment_questions: Are human review checkpoints defined for high-impact decisions?
Are escalation procedures available when automation confidence is low?

dimensions.name: accountability
assessment_questions: Are governance roles and risk ownership formally assigned?
Are AI risk decisions recorded with rationale and approvers?
Are policy controls mapped to operational procedures?
Are independent reviews or audits scheduled and tracked?
Are incident response responsibilities defined and exercised?

dimensions.name: transparency_explainability
dimensions.description: Communicate AI behavior, limitations, and recourse.
assessment_questions: Are user-facing disclosures provided on system purpose and limitations?
Are explanations tailored for affected users and operational teams?
Are channels available for questions, complaints, and contestability?
Are documentation artifacts updated when model behavior changes?
Are communication plans in place for high-impact incidents?

dimensions.name: fairness_nondiscrimination
dimensions.description: Promote fairness outcomes and avoid discriminatory harm.
assessment_questions: Are fairness impacts reviewed for affected communities and user groups?
Are corrective measures defined for inequitable outcomes?

dimensions.name: safety_robustness
dimensions.description: Maintain model quality, robustness, and operational safeguards.
assessment_questions: Are operational safeguards in place for model reliability and drift?
Are robustness checks integrated into monitoring and release workflows?
Are contingency procedures defined for degraded or unsafe performance?

dimensions.name: privacy_data_governance
dimensions.description: Ensure strong personal data governance and protection controls.
assessment_questions: Are data governance controls aligned with privacy and retention obligations?
Are access restrictions and protection safeguards monitored and enforced?

dimensions.name: human_agency_oversight
dimensions.description: Provide human override and escalation pathways where needed.
assessment_questions: Are human override controls available for high-impact decisions?
Are operator responsibilities and escalation routes clearly documented?
Are oversight checkpoints applied for exception and edge cases?
Are affected users given meaningful recourse and human review options?

dimensions.name: accountability
dimensions.description: Set governance structures and clear accountability ownership.
assessment_questions: Are governance responsibilities assigned across product and compliance teams?
Are accountability checkpoints integrated into lifecycle stage-gates?
Are decision logs maintained for key design and deployment choices?
Are issue escalation and remediation workflows periodically reviewed?
